name: CI/CD Stack
tagline: Headless-friendly plugins for failing fast in pipelines.
description: Everything you need to run JMeter in Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI — validate the test plan before the run, auto-stop the test when KPI thresholds breach, and emit a clean results report your pipeline already understands.

reasons.jpgc-plancheck: Validates the JMX before the run — fails fast on missing CSV datasets, undefined variables, or broken references before wasting CI minutes.
reasons.jpgc-autostop: Kills the test automatically when error rate or response time crosses a configured threshold, preventing noisy long-running failures.
reasons.jpgc-synthesis: Produces a compact Synthesis Report — a mix of Summary and Aggregate — that is easy to parse and artifact in CI pipelines.

name: Observability Stack
tagline: Stream live metrics to your existing dashboards during tests.
description: Push JMeter test results in real time to external monitoring backends so you can watch SLAs, latency, and throughput in the same dashboards your ops team already uses — no post-run data import required.

reasons.jpgc-perfmon: Collects server-side CPU, memory, disk I/O, and network metrics from target machines via ServerAgent — correlates infrastructure load with JMeter results.
reasons.jmeter-datadog-backend-listener: Streams all sampler results to Datadog in real time so you can build dashboards and alerts using your existing Datadog infrastructure.
reasons.jmeter.backendlistener.elasticsearch: Sends sample results to Elasticsearch for long-term storage, allowing rich Kibana dashboards and cross-run performance trend analysis.

name: Load Shaping Stack
tagline: Precise ramp profiles, target RPS, and safe failure thresholds.
description: Move beyond simple thread-count ramps. Control exact requests-per-second schedules, use concurrency-based thread groups that scale to demand, and back it all with an auto-stop listener so your tests never run away.

reasons.jpgc-casutg: Replaces the default Thread Group with Concurrency and Arrivals Thread Groups — spawn threads on-demand to hit target concurrency rather than a fixed count.
reasons.jpgc-tst: Sets a desired RPS (hits/s) schedule with precision ramp-up and hold phases — ideal for reproducing production traffic shapes.
reasons.jpgc-autostop: Guards runaway tests: automatically stops execution when error rate or latency exceeds configurable thresholds during the load run.

name: AI-Ready Starter
tagline: All AI-augmented plugins in one install.
description: A curated selection of plugins that are AI-Ready — meaning they have been tested and validated for use with AI-assisted tooling and workflows. This collection is auto-populated from the AI-Ready registry and updates automatically as new plugins earn the badge.
